title: VACUUM issue on table with generated column
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(0 DESC);
key_bug_features: VACUUM on table with generated column causes error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 AS(c1 + 1));
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(c2 COLLATE NOCASE);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
